tasks.title: Parallel dispatch: consumir parallel_groups em run
tasks.description: Especificar como run() consome o primeiro parallel_group e despacha N agentes via ThreadPoolExecutor; orchestrator continua single-writer.

tasks.title: Parallel dispatch: implementar
tasks.description: service.run aceita parallel=N; CLI run aceita --parallel.

tasks.title: Parallel dispatch: teste de wave concorrente
tasks.description: Verifica que N tasks elegiveis sao despachadas em paralelo (timing).

tasks.title: Metricas estruturadas
tasks.description: Definir o conjunto: events_by_action, output_rejected_by_code, tasks_done/total, attempts_total, run_status.

tasks.title: Metricas: modulo + CLI
tasks.description: src/esaa/metrics.py com compute_metrics(events); esaa metrics CLI emite JSON.

tasks.title: Metricas: testes unitarios
tasks.description: Confere contagens por action; deteccao de rejection rate por error_code.

tasks.title: Adapter LLM real (HTTP generico)
tasks.description: Adapter que faz POST do dispatch_context para um endpoint configuravel (ESAA_LLM_URL) e retorna a resposta como agent_result.

tasks.title: HttpLlmAdapter
tasks.description: src/esaa/adapters/http_llm.py implementa AgentAdapter via urllib; auth por header opcional.

tasks.title: HttpLlmAdapter: teste end-to-end com fake server
tasks.description: Sobe http.server local; service.run dispacha pelo adapter; verifica claim->complete cycle.

tasks.title: Hotfix CI scenario
tasks.description: Cenario: agente emite issue.report -> orchestrator cria hotfix -> claim/complete(2 checks)/review -> issue.resolve.

tasks.title: Snapshot/checkpoint do event store
tasks.description: esaa snapshot --before <seq> grava .roadmap/snapshots/seq-<N>.json com a projecao naquele ponto.

tasks.title: Lock multi-processo no append
tasks.description: Lock file-based atomico (O_CREAT|O_EXCL) com retry/timeout; protege append_events em multi-processo.

tasks.title: Lock: testes de concorrencia
tasks.description: Spawn de subprocesso que segura o lock; verifica timeout/retry.
